results.title: East Franklin Board of Supervisors approves reports
results.description: At a recent monthly public meeting of East Franklin Township’s board of supervisors, members voted to accept reports from multiple departments.

results.title: Opinion: NH’s elder justice advocates are asking the right question. The law has not given them the right answer.
results.description: At the Northern New England Regional Financial Abuse Specialty Team Conference on elder abuse and exploitation, advocates will discuss the need to recognize the voices of concerned persons who are often overlooked in the fight against elder financial exploitation.

results.title: Charges waived for court against Allegheny County resident
results.description: Charges have been waived for court against an Allegheny County resident.

results.title: Iowa PBS Presents General Dodge and the Transcontinental Railroad
results.description: JOHNSTON — Soldier. Spymaster. Builder. Grenville Dodge fought to preserve a nation and connect a continent. General Dodge and the Transcontinental Railroad, a new documentary from Iowa PBS premieres Monday, June 15 at 8 p.m. It will be rebroadcast Sunday,...
